name: python3-netifaces
title: python3-netifaces
description:
portable network interface information - Python 3.x
netifaces provides a (hopefully portable-ish) way for Python programmers to
get access to a list of the network interfaces on the local machine, and to
obtain the addresses of those network interfaces.
.
This package contains the module for Python 3.x.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-netifaces because portable network interface information - Python 3.x.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-netifaces as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-netifaces with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-netifaces --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
